task.title: Creating a partitioned data set member and adding it to an MVS subproject

titlealts.searchtitle: Creating a PDS member and adding it to an MVS subproject

task.shortdesc: Follow these steps to create a partitioned data set member and add it to an MVS subproject.

keywords.indexterm: MVS subprojectadding a new partitioned data set member
subproject, MVSadding a new partitioned data set member

taskbody.prereq: You must be connected to a remote system.

step.cmd: In the Remote Systems view, navigate to the partitioned data set in which you want to create the new member.

step.stepresult: A window opens, showing the data set name that the new member is created in. You are prompted to enter the new name.
The new member name is displayed in the window.

step.cmd: Open the new member in the editor.
Type or select the subproject name.
